messages.message: PHPDoc tag @var with type Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo<App\Models\User, App\Models\Notification> is not subtype of type Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo<App\Models\User, $this(App\Models\Notification)>.
